news.headline: Hydro One buys 48% interest in East-West Tie Limited Partnership from OMERS in northern Ontario expansion.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Toronto, Hydro One Limited (Hydro One) revealed that its wholly-owned branch, Hydro One Networks Inc., has agreed to buy about 48% stake in the East-West Tie Limited Partnership from OMERS affiliates.

news.headline: Magma Power LLC obtains 15th patent, advancing plans for $20B magma-powered AI data center, shaping the future.
news.summary: Magma Power™ is set to revolutionize the renewable energy sector, with experts predicting its widespread adoption in the near future. The innovative company, Magma Power LLC, based in New York, made a significant announcement on December 19, 2024. They are at the forefront of this movement, showcasing their role as a leading global player in renewable energy solutions. With escalating concerns about traditional energy sources, the focus has shifted towards sustainable alternatives like magma power. This shift is expected to bring about substantial changes in the energy industry, paving the way for a cleaner and more efficient future.

news.headline: Security First Insurance and Embark MGA collaborate to launch HO5 insurance for new home builders in Florida.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on December 19, 2024, Security First Insurance and Embark MGA, both state-based insurance firms, have partnered to introduce a novel HO5 homeowners' insurance initiative tailored for new home builders. This program aims to provide a cost-effective and seamless insurance solution.

news.headline: StemCyte's Phase IIa trial shows 85% of patients with Post-COVID Syndrome experience relief from fatigue with cord blood.
news.summary: In Baldwin Park, California, on December 19, 2024, StemCyte revealed a major milestone in their Phase IIa clinical study of HPC, Cord Blood (HPC, CB) for addressing Post-COVID Syndrome (Long COVID). The outcomes of the trial showcased a notable enhancement in fatigue...

news.headline: Alaris Equity Partners Income Trust announces Q4 distribution; US distribution may violate laws.
news.summary: This information is prohibited from being distributed in the United States. Failure to adhere to this restriction may be considered a violation of United States securities law.

news.headline: Stock market rebounds as Dow Jones ends losing streak, with S&P 500 up. Bitcoin sells off while Nvidia rises.
news.summary: Today, there was an attempt at a rebound in the stock market for the Dow Jones and S&P 500. Bitcoin stocks experienced a sell-off, whereas Nvidia saw an increase. The Dow Jones managed to end its losing streak, while an artificial intelligence company's winning streak came to an end.

news.headline: Bitcoin Reserve Act may disrupt crypto's 4-year cycle. Will we see a shift towards a Supercycle?
news.summary: Could the Bitcoin Reserve Act disrupt the traditional Halving cycle, potentially leading to a departure from the usual four-year pattern? Speculation is rife on whether the cryptocurrency market might be headed towards an unprecedented Supercycle, stirring debate among experts and enthusiasts.

news.headline: Proposed settlement in McEvoy v. Diversified Energy impacts landowners in multiple states. Case No. 22-cv-00171-JPB (N.D. W. Va.).
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Kroll Settlement Administration released a statement concerning the lawsuit McEvoy v. Diversified Energy and EQT, case number 22-cv-00171-JPB (N.D. W. Va.). A tentative settlement agreement has been achieved in this case.

news.headline: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania approved to enhance smart grid in PA. Infrastructure improvement plans to continue through 2029.
news.summary: Approval has been granted for FirstEnergy Pennsylvania (FE PA), a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) operating as Met-Ed, Penn Power, Penelec, and West Penn Power, to continue improving the smart grid infrastructure across Pennsylvania until 2029. The initiative, set for completion by the end of the decade, will involve a significant investment to enhance the state's energy distribution systems. This decision, announced in Greensburg, Pennsylvania, on December 19, 2024, underscores the commitment to modernizing and optimizing the electrical grid. Followed by this approval, substantial advancements are expected in the efficiency and reliability of energy services for consumers in the region.

news.headline: CMC issues first biochar CO2 Removal Certificates with Flowcarbon on Puro.earth, highlighting leadership in sustainable carbon removal.
news.summary: In New York, Clean Maine Carbon (CMC) recently launched its initial batch of biochar CO2 Removal Certificates (CORCs) on the Puro.earth platform in collaboration with Flowcarbon. This marks a significant milestone for CMC in the realm of sustainable carbon removal, showcasing the pivotal role that biochar plays in the fight against climate change and the improvement of agricultural methods. Situated in Greenville, Maine, CMC specializes in converting regionally procured, underutilized woody biomass into high-grade biochar. This underscores their commitment to environmental stewardship and innovation.

news.headline: Bitcoin dropped to $95,000, but signs show the worst may be done. Concerns arise over future crashes.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has dropped to the $95,000 range recently, indicating a significant correction. However, analysis shows that the worst of the adjustment might have passed.

news.headline: New Zealand Trade Balance Actual -1544M (Forecast -, Previous -1,544.0M)
New Zealand Imports Actual 6.92B (Forecast -, Previous 7.31B)
New Zealand Annual Trade Bal. Actual -8.25B (Forecast -, Previous -8.96B)
New Zealand Exports Actual 6.48B (Forecast -, Previous 5.77B ,Revision 5.61B)
Nike's CEO announces swift measures to satisfy shareholders, boosting shares.
University of Phoenix wins 2024 Academic Partner of the Year award from EC-Council, chosen from over 2,000 institutions worldwide.
news.summary: In Phoenix, the University of Phoenix has been honored with the EC-Council 2024 Academic Partner of the Year Award. The EC-Council Academia division recognizes academic institutions and educators in North America and beyond for their outstanding contributions to cybersecurity education. Chosen from more than 2,000 contenders, this year's recipients exemplify remarkable innovation, influence, and commitment in preparing the future cybersecurity workforce.

news.headline: Eos Energy receives $68.3 million from $303.5 million DOE loan guarantee for its energy project.
news.summary: Eos has confirmed the receipt of an initial loan disbursement from the Department of Energy's Loan Programs Office, totaling $68.3 million.

news.headline: FedEx to spin off trucking business, reduces outlook.
Rupert Murdoch faces difficulty in changing family trust to consolidate son Lachlan's power, appeal due before Christmas.
news.summary: An appeal by Mr. Murdoch regarding the consolidation of his son Lachlan's authority within his media empire is scheduled to be heard shortly before the Christmas holidays.

news.headline: Experts at DealBook Summit foresee 2030 AI landscape; discuss top opportunities and risks with the tech.
news.summary: Ten artificial intelligence experts gathered at the recent DealBook Summit to delve into the major opportunities and risks presented by the technology.

news.headline: US House Democratic Leader Jeffries: The Republicans new stopgap bill is laughable - CNN reporter on X.
Stock of FedEx surges as company announces spin-off of freight business.
Excelerate Energy (NYSE: EE) President will attend investor meetings at UBS Global Energy & Utilities Winter Conference in Utah on Jan 14-15, 2025.
news.summary: Excelerate Energy, Inc. revealed that Steven Kobos, President and CEO, will be holding individual investor meetings at the UBS Global Energy & Utilities Winter Conference. The event is set to take place on January 14-15, 2025, at The St. Regis Hotel in Deer Valley, Utah. Excelerate Energy is a U.S.-based LNG corporation headquartered in The Woodlands, Texas, trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EE. This company is known for revolutionizing the LNG industry.

news.headline: Phillips 66 to present at Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech & Utilities Conference in Houston.
news.summary: Phillips 66 will be participating in the upcoming Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech & Utilities Conference in Houston. The conference will provide a platform for the company to discuss its strategies and outlook in the industry. Phillips 66's involvement underscores its commitment to engaging with investors and stakeholders. This event is expected to draw significant attention, with industry experts and key players gathering to share insights and discuss the latest trends. This presents a valuable opportunity for Phillips 66 to showcase its expertise and vision.

news.headline: Innocan Pharma plans to offer 3,500,000 units in private placement.
news.summary: Innocan Pharma Corporation, with stock symbols CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, and OTC: INNPF, has disclosed its plan to undertake an unbrokered private placement of a maximum of 3,500,000 units. The corporation is based in Herzliya, Israel, and Calgary, AB.

news.headline: Cook Inlet Region, Inc. (CIRI) buys OSC Edge, a top IT service provider. Expanding its portfolio with engineering expertise.
news.summary: CIRI, based in Alaska, has recently acquired OSC Edge, a prominent company offering IT engineering, integration, and data management services. This acquisition allows CIRI to broaden its portfolio and enhance its offerings in the technology sector.

news.headline: Jowell Global Ltd. reports $85.7M revenue, up 1.5% YoY. $107.3M GMV in first half of 2024, down 7.0% YoY.
news.summary: In the first half of the year, Jowell Global Ltd. reported a revenue of $85.7 million, marking a 1.5% increase compared to the previous year. However, the Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) for the same period was $107.3 million, showing a decline of 7.0% year-over-year. Jowell Global Ltd., a prominent player in the cosmetics and health industry, shared this financial data without disclosing the exact source. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol JWEL, made this announcement from Shanghai on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: FMC Corp (NYSE: FMC) to release Q4 2024 earnings on Feb 4, 2025, after market close; webcast conference call to follow.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on December 19, 2024, FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) shared that they are set to unveil their financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 4, 2025. This announcement will be made post the closing of the stock market through PR Newswire and their official website, https://investors.fmc.com. Additionally, the company will be conducting a virtual conference to discuss the results at a later date.

news.headline: Greenway is acquiring cannabis brands to expand market presence, with an asset purchase agreement on Dec 17, 2024.
news.summary: In Kingsville, Ontario on December 19, 2024, Greenway Greenhouse Cannabis Corporation (CSE: GWAY) (OTCQB: GWAYF), a leading producer of greenhouse cannabis in Canada, announced its recent asset purchase agreement signed on December 17, 2024.

news.headline: Aimco sells assets in Miami, closes on two investments. Company announces special dividend.
news.summary: Today, Apartment Investment and Management Company (Aimco) declared the completion of the sale of its stake in two investments situated in the Edgewater neighborhood of Miami, Florida. Aimco, listed on NYSE as AIV, finalized the sale, marking a significant move in the real estate sector. The sale represents a key milestone for the company as it continues to make strategic decisions to optimize its portfolio. The details of the sale include the divestment of Aimco’s interest in the Edgewater properties, reflecting a noteworthy transaction in the property market.

news.headline: Founder and CEO of Aptos Labs, Mo Shaikh, steps down. Fellow co-founder Avery Ching to take over as CEO.
news.summary: The CEO position at Aptos Labs is undergoing a change as Mo Shaikh, one of the co-creators, is stepping down. The transition will see Avery Ching, another co-founder, taking over the role. This marks a significant shift in leadership within the company.

news.headline: Fed Bank Term Funding loans $13.0b in the week ended December 18th after $15.6b.
Fed discount-window loans $2.08b in the week ended December 18th after $2.61b.
Faraday Future to showcase Faraday X prototype mules in Las Vegas, NV from Jan 5-7. First two mules to undergo testing in the US. $FFIE #electricvehicles.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. revealed that the first two Faraday X (FX) prototype mules equipped with cutting-edge technology will reach the city by the end of this month. The California-based global intelligent electric mobility company will initiate the product development and testing phase for these models in the U.S. The testing will take place at FF’s manufacturing facility in Hanford, CA, with a brief stop in Las Vegas. FF, listed as Nasdaq: FFIE, is set to introduce these prototypes to accelerate advancements in electric vehicle technology.

news.headline: Ostin Technology Group implements 1-for-10 reverse share split; effective on Dec 26, 2024; trading under ticker symbol "OST".
news.summary: In Nanjing, China, on December 19, 2024, Ostin Technology Group Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: OST), an established supplier of display modules and polarizers in China, announced a reverse share split of their ordinary shares with a ratio of 1-for-10. This decision, known as "The Reverse Share Split," was agreed upon by the Company's shareholders during a meeting on November 25, 2024. Following this, the Company's Class A ordinary shares, denoted by the ticker symbol "OST," will commence trading on an adjusted basis from December 26, 2024. The new CUSIP number assigned to the Company’s Class A ordinary shares will be G67927114.

news.headline: Red River Bancshares, Inc. renews stock repurchase program, authorizing purchase of up to $5.0 million of its outstanding shares from Jan 1 to Dec 31, 2025. CEO affirms commitment to returning excess capital to shareholders.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Louisiana, on December 19, 2024, Red River Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: RRBI) announced the renewal of its stock repurchase program. The program, approved by the board of directors, will be effective until December 31, 2024. Under the renewed program, the Company is authorized to buy back up to $5.0 million of its common stock from January 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025. Blake Chatelain, the President and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the renewal, emphasizing the commitment to providing excess capital to shareholders. Repurchases will occur either on the open market at current prices based on market conditions or through private negotiations.

news.headline: Prestige Wealth Inc. (NASDAQ: PWM) regains Nasdaq compliance with minimum bid price requirement.
news.summary: On December 18, 2024, Prestige Wealth Inc. (NASDAQ: PWM), a Hong Kong-based wealth and asset management firm, disclosed that it has met the minimum bid price stipulation under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) for sustained listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The notification was received from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC.

news.headline: Chinese jewelry retailer defies economic slowdown with stock soaring by 437%.
Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. will pay a quarterly dividend of 56 cents per share on Jan 15, 2025 to shareholders.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, the Board of Directors of Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: WASH) announced a quarterly dividend of 56 cents per share for the quarter ending on December 31, 2024. Shareholders of record will receive the dividend on January 15, 2025.

news.headline: Monterey Motorsports Festival to feature rare icons after LA Auto Show, aiming to enhance 2025 Car Week.
news.summary: In December 19, 2024, it was announced that the 2025 Monterey Motorsports Festival in Los Angeles aims to enhance the annual Car Week by providing diverse and immersive experiences to enthusiasts in a festival setting. This year, the festival plans to reintroduce the display of three significant items, promising a revitalized experience for attendees.

news.headline: Waterstone Financial declares $0.15 dividend per common share, payable on Feb 3, 2025, to shareholders of record by Jan 8.
news.summary: In Wauwatosa, Wisconsin, on December 19, 2024, Waterstone Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: WSBF) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per common share. Shareholders of record as of January 8, 2025, will receive the dividend on February 3, 2025.

news.headline: VICI Properties closes $750M in senior unsecured notes offering at 5.125% due 2031, issued at 99.643% of par value.
news.summary: In New York, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) disclosed that its subsidiary, VICI Properties L.P., has successfully concluded a public offering of $750 million worth of 5.125% senior unsecured notes due 2031. These Notes were issued at 99.643% of par value and are set to mature on November 15, 2031. The Issuer plans to utilize the net proceeds from this offering to repay its existing $750 million outstanding debt.

news.headline: UDR Inc. (NYSE: UDR) declares $0.425 per share quarterly dividend for Q4 2024. 209th consecutive dividend, payable on Jan 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Denver, UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR), a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly dividend for the fourth quarter of 2024. The dividend is set at $0.425 per share and will be disbursed in cash on January 31, 2025. Shareholders of UDR common stock as of January 9, 2025, will be eligible for this dividend payment. This upcoming dividend distribution will mark the 209th consecutive quarterly dividend paid by the Company on its common stock.

news.headline: New MMORPG Ragnarok Landverse: Genesis to launch on Ronin in early 2025, evoking nostalgia for older gamers.
news.summary: Fans of a popular MMORPG from the 2000s are eagerly anticipating the release of its Web3 version, which is expected to attract gamers who grew up playing the original title.

news.headline: US Steel Corp (NYSE: X) projects Q4 2024 adj net earnings per diluted share of ($0.29) to ($0.25) and adj EBITDA of about $150 million.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, the United States Steel Corporation (NYSE: X) has projected adjusted net earnings per diluted share for the fourth quarter of 2024 to be in the range of ($0.29) to ($0.25). The company anticipates the adjusted EBITDA for the same quarter to be around $150 million. The fourth quarter of 2024 was highlighted by significant progress towards advancing their Best for All® future vision. Key achievements included successfully executing growth capital investments totaling over $4 billion. A notable milestone was reached on October 31, 2024, with the first coil produced at Big River 2 (BR2) and subsequent shipments made.

news.headline: NorthWestern Energy to power Butte, Montana data center for Atlas Power Group with 75MW load in 2026, could grow to 150MW.
news.summary: Butte, Montana - NorthWestern Energy Group, Inc., operating as NorthWestern Energy (Nasdaq: NWE), has revealed its intention to offer electricity supply services to Atlas Power Group at their Butte data center. Atlas Power Group is currently a NorthWestern Energy transmission service client. The anticipated new electric supply load is estimated at 75 megawatts starting in 2026, with a projected increase of potentially another 75 megawatts within the following three to five years. This move aligns with NorthWestern Energy's strategic energy plans.

news.headline: Innovative Solutions & Support reports Q4 2024 results, with net revenue at $15.4M (+18.4% YoY). A leading avionic solutions provider.
news.summary: In Exton, Pennsylvania, Innovative Solutions & Support, Inc. (Nasdaq: ISSC) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter and year ending September 30, 2024. Fourth quarter highlights for 2024 showcased a notable increase in net revenue, reaching $15.4 million, reflecting an 18.4% growth from the same quarter in the previous year. Innovative Solutions & Support is known for its cutting-edge avionic solutions tailored for commercial, business aviation, and military sectors.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold announces C$0.02 quarterly dividend for 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 19, 2024, Sandstorm Gold Ltd. (NYSE: SAND) (TSX: SSL) has declared its fourth quarterly cash dividend for 2024 at C$0.02 per share. The dividend was approved by the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Surf Air Mobility names David Anderman to board of directors on Dec 17, 2024. Previously CLO, now with Stellar Ventures.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) has revealed that David Anderman will join the Company’s board of directors from December 17, 2024. He previously held the position of Chief Legal Officer at Surf Air between June 2023 and May 2024. Anderman is presently the Co-Founder and General Partner of Stellar Ventures, a venture fund focusing on supporting upcoming space innovators.
